name: Witchcrafter Magistus Verre
desc:
1 Spellcaster monster + 1 LIGHT Spellcaster with 1000 ATK and 2800 DEF
Must first be Fusion Summoned using the above materials.
Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 Spell; negate the effects of all face-up cards your opponent currently controls, and if you do, this card gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each card negated by this effect, until the end of this turn.
If this card would leave the field by your opponent’s card effect, you can shuffle 1 Spellcaster monster from your banishment into the Deck instead.
